title: Stripe Terminal reader product sheets
excerpt: Learn about Stripe Terminal hardware specifications. In the Dashboard, [browse and purchase available readers and accessories](https://dashboard.stripe.com/terminal/shop). These product sheets contain important device specifications, operating information and instructions, and disclosures and warnings provided by the manufacturer. - [Stripe Reader S710](https://stripe.com/s710/manual) - [Stripe Reader S700](https://stripe.com/s700/manual) - [Stripe S700/S710 Case](https://stripe.com/s700-s710-case)
